# LovHack

> LovHack is a beginner-friendly online hackathon community where developers, designers, and first-time builders ship real projects together in 48 hours.

## About

LovHack organizes 48-hour online hackathons for builders of all skill levels. No experience required — just bring ideas and enthusiasm. Participants form teams, build real web applications, and compete for prizes.

## Key Facts

- **Website**: https://lovhack.dev
- **Format**: 48-hour online hackathons
- **Audience**: Beginners to experienced developers
- **Community**: 500+ builders across 20+ countries
- **Discord**: https://t.co/qMNpoZoiQZ

## Pages

- [Home](https://lovhack.dev): Main landing page with upcoming events and community info
- [About](https://lovhack.dev/about): Mission, values, and how hackathons work
- [Hackathons](https://lovhack.dev/hackathons): Upcoming and past hackathon events
- [Mini-Hack](https://lovhack.dev/mini-hack): Beginner-friendly mini hackathon event
- [Sponsors](https://lovhack.dev/sponsors): Partner companies and sponsor perks
- [Season 1](https://lovhack.dev/season-1): Archive of the first LovHack hackathon with winners

## Events

### Season 1 (Completed)
- Date: January 2-4, 2025
- 100+ builders, 43 projects shipped, 20+ countries
- $5K+ in prizes

### Mini-Hack (Coming Soon)
- Date: February 14-15, 2025
- Beginner-friendly format
- Sponsors: gen.xyz, CREAO

### LovHack Mini x Medo (Coming Soon)
- Date: February 28 — March 1
- Free 48-hour online hackathon powered by Medo
- 300 free Medo credits for all participants
- Sponsors: Medo, gen.xyz

### Season 2 (Planned)
- Date: Late 2026
- Registrations closed
